label: Pawn maker
description: Generates pawn Things (alive or as corpses) from a specified PawnKindDef.

pawnKind.label: Pawn kind
pawnKind.description: PawnKindDef that determines the pawn race, gear, and stats.

alive.label: Alive
alive.description: Whether generated pawns are alive (true) or corpses (false). Null means game default.

corpseAgeRangeDays.label: Corpse age range days
corpseAgeRangeDays.description: Age range in days for generated corpses. Only meaningful when alive is false.
